title: Rename sweep — docs/architecture + guides/setup
description: Fix the three stale Fabric artifact names in the architecture docs and guides — including the worst offender, fabric-artifacts-inventory.md, which tags non-existent artifacts as '✅ Active'. Part of the task-021 sweep (audit C-01).
acceptanceCriteria: fabric-artifacts-inventory.md: the '✅ Active' table rows for `clean_columnsAndHeaders` (~L20) and `semantic_model_oeminsightbi` (~L33) name the real on-disk artifacts (bronze-to-silver.Notebook, OEMInsightBI_v2); semantic-model refs at ~L49/L58/L84 and the report diagram node at ~L85 updated. No non-existent artifact is tagged 'Active'.

PRESERVE the rename-suggestion DISCUSSION at ~L64 ('clean_columnsAndHeaders → Consider transform_bronze_to_silver') — this is meta-commentary about naming, not an active artifact reference. Optionally annotate that the bronze-to-silver rename has since happened; do not delete the discussion.

data-flow-diagram.md: the mermaid node label `S1[clean_columnsAndHeaders
Notebook]` (~L109) updated to bronze-to-silver (and any report/semantic-model nodes if present).
docs/guides/FAQ.md (~L74 notebook ref) and docs/setup/TROUBLESHOOTING.md (~L108 notebook ref) updated to bronze-to-silver.
Mermaid still renders (node IDs/labels balanced) and every replaced path exists on disk.
notes: Full context: parent task-021 + audit C-01.
DISK TRUTH: fabric/OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel/, fabric/bronze-to-silver.Notebook/, fabric/report2.Report/ are canonical; old names live ONLY under fabric/archive/.
Key judgment call here is the L64 'Consider renaming' discussion — it MUST be preserved as naming meta-commentary, not swept.

--- IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-21 (implement-agent, completed) --- Swept 3 renames across fabric-artifacts-inventory.md/data-flow-diagram.md/FAQ.md/TROUBLESHOOTING.md. Fixed false '✅ Active' rows (L20 notebook, L33 SM, +L34 report row beyond hint, same false-active class). Mermaid nodes L78/L84/L85/L109 updated, bracket-balance verified,
preserved. PRESERVED L64 'Consider renaming' discussion with a '(renamed since)' annotation. Positive control: all 3 new paths on disk; post-edit grep shows only preserved L64 retains an old token.
